title: ASR backend evaluation harness
created_from: user-approved staged ASR backend testing plan

follow_ups.title: Add Qwen3-ASR local adapter after runtime feasibility check
follow_ups.reason: Qwen3-ASR is a strong candidate but the official high-performance streaming path depends on vLLM/CUDA-like infrastructure; Mac M4 feasibility should be confirmed before implementation.

follow_ups.title: Add MiMo-V2.5-ASR offline adapter after weight/runtime sizing check
follow_ups.reason: MiMo-V2.5-ASR has strong public results but is much heavier and appears less suited to first-pass realtime partial testing on macOS.
